name: Ferocious Beasts

prerequisites.name: animal companion, Pet, or Bonded Animal

description: Since ancient times, the mightiest orc beast tamers would draw out the true fighting spirit of their companion beasts by feeding the creatures a draft incorporating the orc's own blood. All animal companions, pets, familiars, and bonded animals you have gain the feat, and gain one reaction per round they can use only for Orc Ferocity. If you have the ancestry feat, all animal companions, pets, familiars, and bonded animals you have also gain the benefits of that feat when using the Orc Ferocity reaction.
